UsageCost: Free charging here. U may voluntarily offer something for exchange (trade),for example vegetables, spare parts,vintage PCs...

AddressInfo.Title: Private Voluntary Charging Station-Base 493.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: U must order charging here in advance as soon,as U can be4 planned trip,I am not always here.Order charging via email sabina.zelena@yahoo.com .I recieve guests between 12:00 & 00:00,please, do not wake me up soon @ the morning. Charging is only possible, when I am here.

Connections.Comments: Free of charge. Type E socket.

GeneralComments: Private charging point. Non-commercial. Owned by physical person,not a company. Voluntarily shared socket.The max.current 16A is also max.total current, U can draw(combined for all sockets).Toilets available. Accomodation possible,thus overnight charging available.
